message:
fix(list): --json flag ignored when --tree defaults to true

The --tree flag was changed to default true (364691fa), which made
prettyFormat always true. Since the prettyFormat branch returned before
reaching the jsonOutput check, --json was silently ignored.

Fix: check jsonOutput before prettyFormat so JSON output takes priority.

This broke gt mail inbox, gt mq list, gt hook, and all other gt commands
that parse bd list JSON output.

Co-Authored-By: Matt Wilkie <matt.wilkie@yukon.ca>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
